title: Darkfog
description: yet another horror modpack, with an emphasis on atmosphere and a rustic outdoorsy vibe.
body:
## yet another horror modpack, with an emphasis on atmosphere and a rustic outdoorsy vibe.
Some general new features include:

- fully functional proximity voice chat with sound physics
- 3 different shader options
- Complete VR support
- Biome-Specific ambience
- Higher difficulty early game
- Much more dangerous nights that cannot be avoided
- Smarter monsters that can track down a target
- New structures
- New monsters with unique mechanics to keep players on their toes
- Impenetrable dark

I have long been frustrated with the state of Minecraft horror and it's focus on creepypasta-esque monsters, so I made this modpack to hopefully push the scene in a more subtle, atmosphere oriented direction.

feel free to use this modpack however you want, if you want to make your own version of it you're absolutely welcome to.

Cave Dweller Curseforge Page: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined)
